summary: BLOCK 573 & 574 Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Action Required banner code correctly implements conditional display logic (user && !discogs_oauth_verified && discogs_migration_dismissed && location !== /settings), (2) Gold Connect button styling verified with gradient+glow+border, (3) Post-OAuth re-check fetches /api/user/profile, (4) All AlbumArt images use loading='eager' (22/22 AlbumArt images), (5) Error cascade correctly implements proxy→WebP→original→Disc icon fallback. Test user has discogs_migration_dismissed=false so banner doesn't show (correct behavior).

issues: HTML nesting warning: button cannot contain nested button (add-missing-values-btn inside treasury-collection-btn) - non-blocking accessibility issue
Accessibility warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen reader users (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 573 ✅ - App.js: Action Required banner (lines 123-141) with data-testid='discogs-action-banner', AlertTriangle icon, descriptive text, gold Connect button (data-testid='discogs-banner-connect-btn'), Dismiss button (data-testid='discogs-banner-dismiss')
BLOCK 573 ✅ - App.js: Banner hidden on /settings page (line 123: location.pathname !== '/settings')
BLOCK 573 ✅ - App.js: Banner shows only when needsDiscogs = user && !user.discogs_oauth_verified && user.discogs_migration_dismissed (line 106)

BLOCK 573 ✅ - DiscogsImport.js: Gold Connect button (lines 220-228) with inline styles: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700, #F4B521), boxShadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,0.3), border: 1.5px solid #DAA520, color: #1A1A1A
BLOCK 573 ✅ - DiscogsImport.js: Post-OAuth re-check (lines 97-103) fetches /api/user/profile to verify golden_hive_verified status
BLOCK 574 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: loading='eager' attribute on all images (line 165)
BLOCK 574 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: Error cascade (lines 151-161): proxy first (proxyImageUrl) → WebP fallback → original format → Disc icon
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 573/574 fully verified. Test user (test_recovery@test.com) has discogs_migration_dismissed=false so Action Required banner doesn't appear (correct behavior - banner only shows when migration was dismissed but OAuth not completed). Gold Connect button styling verified on /collection page with computed styles: background=linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(255,215,0), rgb(244,181,33)), boxShadow=rgba(255,215,0,0.3) 0px 0px 20px. All 22 AlbumArt images on /nectar have loading='eager'. Error cascade in AlbumArt correctly tries proxy→WebP→original→Disc icon.
